allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''travel_finnmark_results.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); [print\(f""{r[''name''][:30]:30} pages={r[''pages'']} issues={r[''issues'']} crit={r[''critical'']} serious={r[''serious'']}""\) for r in d]")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://thaidispos.com/" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"; $r.Content.Length; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(15000, $r.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://thaidispos.com/dispensaries/wonderland-bangkok" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('"@type":"LocalBusiness"'\); if \($start -lt 0\) { $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('"@type":"Place"'\) }; if \($start -lt 0\) { $start = $r.Content.IndexOf\('application/ld+json'\) }; "JSON-LD start: $start"; if \($start -ge 0\) { $r.Content.Substring\($start, [Math]::Min\(4000, $r.Content.Length - $start\)\) })

PowerShell($url = "https://weed.th/shop/ae7ba0c9-5842-4387-8245-7c6172141f8c/udon-thani/boomtreehc"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; $c = $r.Content; "--- /api/ paths in HTML ---"; \($c | Select-String -Pattern '/api/[a-zA-Z0-9/_\\-{}]+' -AllMatches\).Matches | Select-Object -Unique -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "  > " + $_.Value }; "--- 30 chars around 'Call' button ---"; $idx = $c.IndexOf\('>Call</'\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { "Context: ..." + $c.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 400\), [Math]::Min\(800, $c.Length - $idx + 400\)\) }; "--- fetch\( and axios. calls ---"; \($c | Select-String -Pattern '\(fetch|axios\\.\(get|post\)|\\.ajax\)\\\([^\)]{0,160}' -AllMatches\).Matches | Select-Object -Unique -First 8 | ForEach-Object { "  > " + $_.Value.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(180, $_.Value.Length\)\) })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location $using:PWD; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; python -m scrapers.thailand_cannabis.webapp.app --port 8765 } ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "/ -> $\($r1.StatusCode\), $\($r1.Content.Length\) bytes" ; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/city/udon_thani" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "/city/udon_thani -> $\($r2.StatusCode\), $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes" ; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/whatsapp/ae7ba0c9-5842-4387-8245-7c6172141f8c" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "/api/whatsapp/<sid> -> $\($r3.StatusCode\), $\($r3.Content\)" ; $r4 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/templates" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "/templates -> $\($r4.StatusCode\), $\($r4.Content.Length\) bytes" } finally { Stop-Job $job; Receive-Job $job | Out-Null; Remove-Job $job })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location $using:PWD; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; python -m scrapers.thailand_cannabis.webapp.app --port 8765 } ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $sid = python -c "import sqlite3; c = sqlite3.connect\('scrapers/thailand_cannabis/data/outreach.sqlite'\); print\(c.execute\(\\"SELECT source_id FROM shops WHERE canonical_city='Udon Thani' AND google_phone IS NOT NULL AND google_phone != '' ORDER BY lead_score DESC LIMIT 1\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)" ; "Test shop SID: $sid" ; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/whatsapp/$sid" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 ; "/api/whatsapp/$sid -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" ; $r.Content } finally { Stop-Job $job; Receive-Job $job 2>&1 | Out-Null; Remove-Job $job })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location $using:PWD; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; python -m scrapers.thailand_cannabis.webapp.app --port 8765 } ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { python scrapers/thailand_cannabis/webapp/_smoke_test.py } finally { Stop-Job $job; Receive-Job $job 2>&1 | Out-Null; Remove-Job $job }; Remove-Item scrapers/thailand_cannabis/webapp/_smoke_test.py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; "Chiang Mai Wongnai rows: $\(\(Get-Content scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/wongnai_chiangmai.csv\).Count - 1\)"; "---"; python scrapers/thailand_hospitality/merge_hospitality.py chiangmai 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; python scrapers/thailand_hospitality/aggregate_country.py 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; python scrapers/thailand_hospitality/finalize_country.py 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; "Pattaya retry started: $\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\)" | Out-File -Encoding utf8 scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/_pattaya_retry.log; python scrapers/thailand_hospitality/scrape_wongnai.py "1009-pattaya" --max-pages 100 --delay 15 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/_pattaya_retry.log -Append | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell(Get-Content scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/_pattaya_retry.log -Tail 8; "---"; if \(Test-Path scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/wongnai_1009-pattaya.csv\) { "Pattaya rows: $\(\(Get-Content scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/wongnai_1009-pattaya.csv\).Count - 1\)" } else { "Pattaya CSV: none" })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; "Pattaya retry v2 started: $\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\)" | Out-File -Encoding utf8 scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/_pattaya_retry.log; python scrapers/thailand_hospitality/scrape_wongnai.py "1009-pattaya" --max-pages 100 --delay 15 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath scrapers/thailand_hospitality/data/_pattaya_retry.log -Append | Select-Object -Last 3)
